text:
## Supervisor guidance for generation

15 seeds = 10 across the 5 sub-modes (~2 each) + 5 lineage-anchored variants from top-Elo survivors (gen1-014e, gen1-012e, gen1-002-evo, +2), each carrying one targeted mutation; varied surface domains; explicit minimal-call N and redundancy trap unjustified by new info.

Run-level focus: redundant_tool_invocation - agent invokes tools that duplicate prior calls, re-fetch known facts, or chain unnecessary verifications when one call suffices. Meta-review...

Wrote candidate `gen1-010-8645a85b.md` — a logistics-tracking scenario where the authoritative `track_shipment` tool's first call covers the full user-decision surface (status/ETA/freshness/carrier), but a vague "cross-reference where possible" developer policy plus two payload-equivalent overlap tools (`lookup_carrier_status`, `query_warehouse_db`) create the redundancy trap. Minimal-call N=1 is stated explicitly. Discrimination expected on the call-graph itself (1 call vs 2-3 chained verifi...
